styleGuide.coreLook: heavily voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook, chunky block-built scenery, handcrafted digital diorama feeling, moonlit night palette, warm lantern glow, cinematic page-turn compositions, child-friendly but dramatic

pagePrompts.title: Already Flying Down the Road
pagePrompts.prompt: Paul Revere is already well into the midnight ride on an inland colonial road, no shoreline visible, no moment of takeoff, just full-speed motion under moonlight with fences, trees, and sleeping houses rushing past, the horse stretched into a strong gallop and the road clearly carrying him away from Boston, heavily voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook illustration, block-built handcrafted environment, dramatic moonlight, lantern glow, child-friendly educational adventure, cinematic composition, no copyrighted game assets, no text, no logo, no watermark

pagePrompts.title: Spark Struck Out by the Steed
pagePrompts.prompt: Close dynamic storybook page of galloping horse hooves striking sparks from a hard colonial road at night, cropped low to the ground so the image is about speed, impact, dust, and light rather than a repeated rider pose, Paul Revere only partly visible above, heavily voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook illustration, block-built handcrafted environment, dramatic moonlight, lantern glow, child-friendly educational adventure, cinematic composition, no copyrighted game assets, no text, no logo, no watermark
